name: Stabilized Whipped Cream#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in 1 tablespoon cold water for 5 minutes.
2. Heat until the gelatin melts.
3. Add to 1 cup whipping cream and whisk until the gelatin and cream are well blended.
4. Chill for 1 hour.
5. Beat with an electric mixer until the cream is thick and holds its shape. It will thicken even more as it sets in the refrigerator.
6. Sweeten with powdered sugar and vanilla.
7. The stabilized whipped cream will hold for 2-3 days.
